chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1870 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of instant petition 12.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. This petition was last taken up on 15.8.2022, which is also over three years ago when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. The petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing in the last three years. The question of maintainability still remains unresolved. Today, once again, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
